name: Koala Kruizers
fmcsa_address: 1170 S Main Street, North Canton, OH 44720
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State (CMJW Inc.); BBB; legal name CMJW INC dba KOALA KRUIZERS
notes: Legal name CMJW INC dba KOALA KRUIZERS. Operates ~29 vehicles per company sources, FMCSA shows 22 power units. Operation classification Private (Property) but cargo carried is Passengers - non-emergency medical transport and shuttle for seniors and children. Carrier Registration Information shown as Outdated in SAFER. Ohio SoS trade name registration noted 2001-03-05 (entity 1218385); underlying corp CMJW Inc incorporated 1995-01-26.

name: Van's Med-Tec Transport & Svc
registry_source: BBB (Virginia SCC entity not directly confirmed via web search)
notes: No matching record found in FMCSA SAFER for VAN'S MED-TEC, VAN'S MED, VANS MED TEC, MED-TEC or VAN MED keyword searches. Company is a non-emergency medical (wheelchair/stretcher) van service in Danville/Pittsylvania County VA; likely operates intrastate only and may not require interstate USDOT registration. Business reportedly started 1989-02-01; current LLC formally registered 2018-04-18 per BBB. Two related entities seen in public sources: 'Van's Med-Tec Transport, LLC' (135 Forestdale Dr) and 'Vans Med-TEC Transport Svcs Inc' (3611 Mount Cross Rd). Virginia SCC CIS lookup needed for confirmed entity ID and status.

name: New Malwa Express Inc
registry_source: Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry not directly retrieved
notes: FMCSA address matches input address exactly. Operation classification Auth. For Hire, Authorized for Property. Cargo: General Freight, Household Goods, Building Materials, Fresh Produce, Meat, US Mail, Refrigerated Food, Beverages, Paper Products, Auto Parts. 126 inspections / 8 crashes (0 fatal, 1 injury, 7 tow-aways) in past 24 months. This is a long-haul freight trucking carrier, NOT a school bus / student transportation operator - likely a mis-classification for Summit's target list.

name: Peoples Express
registry_source: Minnesota SOS lookup not directly retrieved; company self-reports ~30+ year operating history
notes: FMCSA city/state match input (Wadena MN); FMCSA shows 12182 Hwy 10 G as physical address vs input 15578 Shady Acres Dr - both Wadena addresses. Auth. For Hire and Priv. Pass. (Business); Authorized for Passenger. Cargo: Passengers. Specialized transportation (wheelchair, ambulatory, NEMT) across 28 counties in Western/Central MN. Company self-reports fleet of 48 vehicles vs FMCSA 32 power units. Likely founded ~1989-1992; BBB business start date 1992-01-01.

name: Hour Transportation
officers: Jason E. Kopsch Sr. (Executive Vice President)
registry_source: Michigan LARA (corporation incorporated 1997-11-17) per third-party records; LARA MiBusiness portal not directly retrieved
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword search for HOUR TRANSPORTATION and HOUR TRANS returned no matching records. USDOT 2356721 reported by one third-party source is INACTIVE in SAFER and could not be verified as Hour Transportation. Company is NEMT (Non-Emergency Medical Transport) wheelchair/non-ambulatory provider with branches in Southfield, Ann Arbor, Flint, Shelby Twp; fleet self-reported as ~20 vehicles serving Southeast Michigan. Likely intrastate-only motor carrier registered with Michigan PSC/MDOT rather than interstate FMCSA. Not a school bus / student transportation operator.
